# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(cppx LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

function(exon_copy_windows_asan_runtime target)
    if(NOT WIN32)
        return()
    endif()

    get_target_property(_exon_target_type ${target} TYPE)
    if(NOT _exon_target_type STREQUAL "EXECUTABLE")
        return()
    endif()

    get_filename_component(_exon_compiler_dir "${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}" DIRECTORY)
    set(_exon_asan_runtime "")
    set(_exon_candidates
        "${_exon_compiler_dir}/clang_rt.asan_dynamic-x86_64.dll"
        "$ENV{VCToolsInstallDir}/bin/Hostx64/x64/clang_rt.asan_dynamic-x86_64.dll"
    )

    foreach(_exon_candidate IN LISTS _exon_candidates)
        if(_exon_candidate AND EXISTS "${_exon_candidate}")
            set(_exon_asan_runtime "${_exon_candidate}")
            break()
        endif()
    endforeach()

    if(NOT _exon_asan_runtime)
        message(FATAL_ERROR
            "Windows ASan runtime not found: clang_rt.asan_dynamic-x86_64.dll. "
            "Run from a Visual Studio developer environment or install the MSVC ASan runtime.")
    endif()

    add_custom_command(TARGET ${target} POST_BUILD
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
            "${_exon_asan_runtime}"
            "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:${target}>/clang_rt.asan_dynamic-x86_64.dll")
endfunction()

if(NOT DEFINED EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)
    set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS ON)
endif()

if(TARGET cppx)
    return()
endif()

add_library(cppx-modules)
target_sources(cppx-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.archive.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.archive.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.system.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.boundary.windows.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.bytes.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.checksum.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.checksum.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.fs.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.fs.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.async.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.async.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.client.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.server.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.system.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.transfer.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.transfer.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.net.async.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.net.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.os.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.os.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.platform.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.process.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.process.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.reflect.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.resource.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.resource.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.sync.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.unicode.cppm
)

add_library(cppx ALIAS cppx-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.archive.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.archive.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.system.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.async.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.boundary.windows.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.bytes.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.checksum.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.checksum.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.fs.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.fs.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.async.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.async.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.client.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.server.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.system.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.transfer.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.http.transfer.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.net.async.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.net.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.os.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.os.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.platform.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.process.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.process.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.reflect.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.resource.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.resource.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.sync.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.test.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.unicode.cppm
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"cppx\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"1.7.3\""
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(cppx-modules PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(cppx-modules PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(cppx-modules PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(cppx-modules PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    if(WIN32)

        target_compile_options(cppx-modules PRIVATE
            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()
endif()

if(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)

add_executable(test-archive)
target_sources(test-archive PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/archive.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-archive PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation

    endif()

    endif()

)
target_link_libraries(test-http PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(test-http PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(test-http PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    if(WIN32)

        target_compile_options(test-http PRIVATE
            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()
endif()
exon_copy_windows_asan_runtime(test-http)

add_executable(test-http_async)
target_sources(test-http_async PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/http_async.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-http_async PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(test-http_async PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_async PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(test-http_async PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_async PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    if(WIN32)

        target_compile_options(test-http_async PRIVATE
            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()
endif()
exon_copy_windows_asan_runtime(test-http_async)

add_executable(test-http_async_system)
target_sources(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/http_async_system.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    if(WIN32)

        target_compile_options(test-http_async_system PRIVATE
            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()
endif()
exon_copy_windows_asan_runtime(test-http_async_system)

    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/http_client.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-http_client PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(test-http_client PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_client PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(test-http_client PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_client PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    if(WIN32)

        target_compile_options(test-http_client PRIVATE
            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()
endif()

)

    cppx-modules
)

            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_server PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-http_server PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_server PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    endif()

    endif()

    cppx-modules

        target_link_options(test-http_system_smoke PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl

        )
    endif()

            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_system_smoke PRIVATE

        )
    endif()

    endif()

    endif()

            -fno-omit-frame-pointer

    endif()

    endif()

            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto

    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-http_transfer_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-http_transfer_system PRIVATE

    endif()

    endif()

        )

        target_link_options(test-net PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-net PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-net PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()

        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-os PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-os PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

        )
    endif()

            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-os_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-os_system PRIVATE

    endif()

    endif()

    cppx-modules

        )

        target_link_options(test-platform PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-platform PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-platform PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined

            Security

        )
    endif()

        )
    endif()

    cppx-modules

        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-process PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

            -fsanitize=address,undefined

            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    endif()

    endif()

            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer

    endif()

            -fno-omit-frame-pointer

    endif()

            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

        target_compile_options(test-resource_system PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer

        target_link_options(test-resource_system PRIVATE

    endif()

    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/sync.cpp
)

    cppx-modules
)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(test-sync PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-sync PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(test-sync PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-sync PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()

add_executable(test-unicode)
target_sources(test-unicode PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/unicode.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-unicode PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_compile_options(test-unicode PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-unicode PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_compile_options(test-unicode PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -fno-omit-frame-pointer
        )

        target_link_options(test-unicode PRIVATE
            -fsanitize=address,undefined
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()

    if(WIN32)

        target_compile_options(test-unicode PRIVATE
            /fsanitize=address
        )
    endif()
endif()
exon_copy_windows_asan_runtime(test-unicode)
endif()
